item.title: What Your House Is Built On
item.description: A closer look at the structural systems that support a home, from footings to foundations and everything in between. What makes a strong foundation last for generations?

media:content.media:title: What Your House Is Built On
media:content.media:description: A closer look at the structural systems that support a home, from footings to foundations and everything in between. What makes a strong foundation last for generations?

item.title: 100-Year-Old House Air Sealing Tips & Tricks
item.description: Practical techniques help improve comfort and energy efficiency in a century-old house by reducing unwanted air leaks. Where are the most common problem areas?

media:content.media:title: 100-Year-Old House Air Sealing Tips & Tricks
media:content.media:description: Practical techniques help improve comfort and energy efficiency in a century-old house by reducing unwanted air leaks. Where are the most common problem areas?

item.title: Roof Construction on a Mega Sized Modern Home
item.description: A massive modern home reaches a major milestone as roof construction begins to define the final shape of the structure. How much planning goes into a roof of this scale?

media:content.media:title: Roof Construction on a Mega Sized Modern Home
media:content.media:description: A massive modern home reaches a major milestone as roof construction begins to define the final shape of the structure. How much planning goes into a roof of this scale?

item.title: Steep Roof Work at Nantahala Retreat #12
item.description: Construction continues high above the ground as crews tackle roofing work on a challenging steep-pitch structure. What safety and skill are required for jobs like this?

media:content.media:title: Steep Roof Work at Nantahala Retreat #12
media:content.media:description: Construction continues high above the ground as crews tackle roofing work on a challenging steep-pitch structure. What safety and skill are required for jobs like this?

item.title: Two Days of Laying Blocks in a Basement Build
item.description: Two productive days on site transform a basement foundation as rows of blocks steadily take shape. How much progress can be made in just 48 hours?

media:content.media:title: Two Days of Laying Blocks in a Basement Build
media:content.media:description: Two productive days on site transform a basement foundation as rows of blocks steadily take shape. How much progress can be made in just 48 hours?

item.title: The Best Window Trims: Joints That Never Gap
item.description: A carpentry technique focuses on creating window trim joints that stay tight and clean over time. What makes these joints resist gaps and movement?

media:content.media:title: The Best Window Trims: Joints That Never Gap
media:content.media:description: A carpentry technique focuses on creating window trim joints that stay tight and clean over time. What makes these joints resist gaps and movement?

item.title: From Blueprint to Reality in Building Projects
item.description: A construction project progresses from drawings and ideas to real-world execution, showing how vision becomes structure. What steps bring a blueprint to life?

media:content.media:title: From Blueprint to Reality in Building Projects
media:content.media:description: A construction project progresses from drawings and ideas to real-world execution, showing how vision becomes structure. What steps bring a blueprint to life?

item.title: Insulating the Farmhouse
item.description: A look at the farmhouse insulation process as the project moves forward. Focused on practical building work, tools, and hands-on progress on site. What comes next?

media:content.media:title: Insulating the Farmhouse
media:content.media:description: A look at the farmhouse insulation process as the project moves forward. Focused on practical building work, tools, and hands-on progress on site. What comes next?

item.title: How to Build a Waterproof Deck
item.description: A practical look at building a waterproof deck, with a focus on the process, tools, and construction details that help protect the structure. What steps matter most for a durable finish?

media:content.media:title: How to Build a Waterproof Deck
media:content.media:description: A practical look at building a waterproof deck, with a focus on the process, tools, and construction details that help protect the structure. What steps matter most for a durable finish?

item.title: Building a House: Bolts, Stucco, and Backfill
item.description: A look at house construction progress with bolts, stucco, and backfill work on site. Practical building steps and hands-on project updates. What stage of the build are you most interested in?

media:content.media:title: Building a House: Bolts, Stucco, and Backfill
media:content.media:description: A look at house construction progress with bolts, stucco, and backfill work on site. Practical building steps and hands-on project updates. What stage of the build are you most interested in?

item.title: Turning Hard Work Into a Home Build
item.description: A look at the building process behind turning hard work into a place to call home, with focus on craftsmanship, tools, and steady project progress. What part of the build stands out most?

media:content.media:title: Turning Hard Work Into a Home Build
media:content.media:description: A look at the building process behind turning hard work into a place to call home, with focus on craftsmanship, tools, and steady project progress. What part of the build stands out most?

item.title: Porch Decking Starts | Farmhouse Day 30
item.description: Porch decking begins on the farmhouse project as the crew moves into the next stage of the build. A practical look at the work, tools, and progress on site. What comes next?

media:content.media:title: Porch Decking Starts | Farmhouse Day 30
media:content.media:description: Porch decking begins on the farmhouse project as the crew moves into the next stage of the build. A practical look at the work, tools, and progress on site. What comes next?
